title: StackRefill
description: Automatic hotbar stack refill for smoother gameplay.
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

StackRefill is a lightweight and efficient plugin designed to automatically keep your hotbar replenished during gameplay. Whenever you place blocks, consume food, use fireworks, or similar items, the plugin will instantly pull a matching stack from your inventory and replace the nearly depleted one. This ensures uninterrupted building, adventuring, or PvP action without the hassle of manually dragging items around.

The system is permission-based (stackrefill.use) and allows players to toggle the feature individually with the /stackrefill command. Configuration options let server admins control which players have the feature enabled. The plugin also includes special handling for edible items (replacing with any available food) and prevents issues with items like rabbit stew or shulker boxes to maintain compatibility with other plugins.

With built-in update checking and seamless operation, StackRefill helps improve player quality of life and keeps the focus on gameplay rather than inventory management.
